commands: vite pm pack && rm -rf *.tgz # should pack current workspace root
vite pm pack --recursive --json > out.json && tool json-sort out.json '_.name' && cat out.json && rm -rf *.tgz # should pack all packages in workspace
vite pm pack --filter app && rm -rf *.tgz # should pack specific package (uses --filter app pack)
vite pm pack --filter app --filter @vite-plus-test/utils --json > out.json && tool json-sort out.json '_.name' && cat out.json && rm -rf *.tgz # should pack multiple packages
vite pm pack --out ./dist/package.tgz && rm -rf ./dist # should pack with output file
vite pm pack --pack-destination ./dist && rm -rf ./dist # should pack with destination
vite pm pack --pack-gzip-level 9 && rm -rf *.tgz # should pack with gzip compression level
vite pm pack --json --out 'foo-%s-%v.tgz' && rm -rf *.tgz # should pack with json output
